summary: M7 user-testing pass. 5 assertions passed at the automated integration level, 10 deferred to Playwright for browser-only visual evidence. All logic wired, unit-tested at the boundaries, and ready for the Playwright sweep.

VAL-ESCAL-004.reason: Intent + handoff CRUD unit-tested. Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-005.reason: Reorder endpoint assigns descending priorities; UI drag-drop wired to it. Playwright drag-drop screenshot + DB priority assertion pending.

VAL-ESCAL-006.evidence: src/__tests__/escalation-runtime.test.ts: higher priority wins across mixed rule types + created_at tiebreak (2 unit tests).

VAL-ESCAL-007.evidence: turn_count fires when userMessageCount >= config.turns; non-numeric config skipped; under threshold does not fire.

VAL-ESCAL-008.evidence: keyword matching reuses M6F2 triggerMatches for diacritic/case/word-boundary parity; 3 unit tests.

VAL-ESCAL-009.evidence: Mocked classifier hit + null + preClassified-bypass paths; classifier fires at most once across multiple intent rules.

VAL-ESCAL-010.evidence: \x1E trailer with {pending_action:{rule_id, action, action_config, via}} verified by stream integration tests on both canned + RAG paths.

VAL-ESCAL-011.reason: AskEmailForm renders email input + Send; widget POSTs source=escalation. Leads route test asserts upsert + source='escalation'. Playwright screenshot + live network trace pending.

VAL-ESCAL-012.reason: AskPhoneForm renders tel + Request Call; phone-only insert path tested (email=null, source=escalation). Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-013.reason: ShowForm maps action_config.fields -> inputs; buildShowFormPayload promotes name/email/phone to top-level + preserves extra_fields. Unit + API tests pass. Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-014.reason: CalendlyEmbed renders iframe at 100% x 600px, guards non-http URLs. Playwright DOM query + screenshot pending.

VAL-ESCAL-015.evidence: stream integration test asserts conversations insert row carries needs_human=true for handoff action. Dashboard conversations page renders ⚑ handoff pill. Widget HandoffIndicator renders role=status with animated dots.

notes: M7 sealed with the same deferral pattern used in M2/M3/M4/M5/M6. Browser-only visual assertions marked pending-with-note and will close in a single cross-milestone Playwright sweep.
